---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, hotkey, profile, or behaviour
title: 'feat: '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: []
---

<!--
Before opening, please skim existing issues — there may already be a
discussion you can join. For large features, an issue first (rather
than a PR first) saves everyone time.
-->

## The problem

<!--
What are you trying to do that Lekhini doesn't currently let you do
well? Describe the situation, not the solution. Real use cases beat
hypotheticals.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
How would you like it to work? Sketches, mockups, or even just a
description of the toolbar/hotkey/cursor change are great.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
Other approaches you've thought about, including "live with it" — and
why your proposal is better for your use case.
-->

## Who is this for?

<!--
Which Lekhini audience does this primarily serve?
- [ ] Teachers / presenters
- [ ] Traders / chart analysts
- [ ] General desktop annotation
- [ ] Maintainers / contributors
- [ ] Other (describe)
-->

## Additional context

<!-- Links, references to similar tools, screenshots, anything else. -->
